violations.text: Prep unit door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. Handle on the one door freezer was observed in poor repair, observed crack with missing pieces. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Menu is lacking an allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

An employee was observed eating on prep unit in the kitchen. Eating by employees in food preparation areas is PROHIBITED because of the potential that the hands, food, and food-contact surfaces may become contaminated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored on prep unit. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

An employee at the bar was observed touching ready to eat food (lemons) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Cup was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, strainer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with red biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
At time of inspection, gravy was observed dated (1/15) which exceeds 7 days. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Hamburgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP salmon was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed to be at 36 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC opened at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Prep unit door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. Freezer door handle was observed in poor repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the bar freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Bar glasses were observed stored with lip surface in direct contact with frost. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The floors under dishwasher and in both walk-in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The fans in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of dust and dirt. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
